StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(n.name) AS cast_member_name, MIN(pi.info) AS cast_member_info FROM job.aka_name AS an, job.cast_info AS ci, job.info_type AS it, job.link_type AS lt, job.movie_link AS ml, job.name AS n, job.person_info AS pi, job.title AS t WHERE an.name IS NOT NULL AND (an.name LIKE '%a%' OR an.name LIKE 'A%') AND it.info ='mini biography' AND lt.link IN ('references', 'referenced in', 'features', 'featured in') AND n.name_pcode_cf BETWEEN 'A' AND 'F' AND (n.gender='m' OR (n.gender = 'f' AND n.name LIKE 'A%')) AND pi.note IS NOT NULL AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 AND n.id = an.person_id AND n.id = pi.person_id AND ci.person_id = n.id AND t.id = ci.movie_id AND ml.linked_movie_id = t.id AND lt.id = ml.link_type_id AND it.id = pi.info_type_id AND pi.person_id = an.person_id AND pi.person_id = ci.person_id AND an.person_id = ci.person_id AND ci.movie_id = ml.linked_movie_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[job].[link_type].[link] as [lt].[link]='featured in' OR [dbprove].[job].[link_type].[link] as [lt].[link]='features' OR [dbprove].[job].[link_type].[link] as [lt].[link]='referenced in' OR [dbprove].[job].[link_type].[link] as [lt].[link]='references'

([dbprove].[job].[name].[gender] as [n].[gender]='m' OR [dbprove].[job].[name].[gender] as [n].[gender]='f' AND [dbprove].[job].[name].[name] as [n].[name] like 'A%') AND [dbprove].[job].[name].[name_pcode_cf] as [n].[name_pcode_cf]>='A' AND [dbprove].[job].[name].[name_pcode_cf] as [n].[name_pcode_cf]<='F'

([dbprove].[job].[aka_name].[name] as [an].[name] like '%a%' OR [dbprove].[job].[aka_name].[name] as [an].[name] like 'A%') AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap2063],[dbprove].[job].[aka_name].[person_id] as [an].[person_id])
